title: put/get symmetry without ?field= is the right design
description: When no ?field= is set, get returns the full KV data map as JSON and put accepts a JSON object and writes it as the full data map. A contributor might suggest 'put without ?field= should be an error' (previous behavior) or 'pick a default key name'. Both are wrong: the symmetric design lets callers round-trip whole KV secrets when they own the full map shape. The single-field mode exists for targeted updates to one well-known key.
